## Checklist

- [ ] I updated impacted docs/specs if behavior, API, routing, or user-visible semantics changed.
- [ ] If public surface or canonical semantics changed, I updated `docs/spec/semantic-surface-canonical-map.zh-CN.md` first.
- [ ] If canonical semantics changed, I also synced `README.md`, `README.zh-CN.md`, `docs/spec/README.md`, and affected topic specs.
- [ ] I checked whether this PR changes any public surface entry:
  route / top navigation / CLI top-level command / README Core Concepts.
- [ ] If I changed route definitions, I verified the canonical map and affected summary docs still match.
- [ ] If I changed top navigation, I verified no capability object was accidentally promoted to a top-level product object.
- [ ] If I changed CLI top-level commands, I verified help text and canonical semantics stay aligned.
- [ ] If I changed README Core Concepts, I verified the canonical map was updated first and the concept tier is still correct.
- [ ] I listed concrete verification evidence above.
- [ ] I described rollback or recovery handling above.
